column1:
This setting will allow add Cron expression to generate the cache for all non cached pages. 
* * * * *
| | | | |
| | | | +---- Day of the Week   (range: 1-7)
| | | +------ Month of the Year (range: 1-12)
| | +-------- Day of the Month  (range: 1-31)
| +---------- Hour              (range: 0-23)
+------------ Minute            (range: 0-59)
Example: 0 0 * * * Daily at midnight
